name: Performance - Ticket Verification API Latency
description: Assesses the latency of the ticket verification workflow, including external API calls, under normal and peak conditions.
input: Measure response time for /api/assistant/verify_ticket with valid ticket data under normal and peak loads.
output: Latency metrics for ticket verification requests.
success_criteria: No significant increase in latency under peak load
No failed requests due to timeouts
error_scenarios: External ticket DB API slow or unresponsive
